paths_written: project files needed to fix validation or build failures
rationale: The skill explicitly requires reading and updating .azure/deployment-plan.md, loading recipe/reference guidance, validating Azure config and IaC, and recording proof before changing status to Validated. Its primary verb runs validation commands such as azd provision --preview, bicep build, terraform validate, plus project build commands, so Azure control-plane/auth endpoints and package/provider registries are implied. It may write plan updates, generated build/cache artifacts, and source/config fixes for validation failures, but no deletion is specified.
